summary: server-parket@3.9.2: child_process + HTTP patterns require human review
details: Package contains shell execution primitives (execSync invocations of bash/zsh in index.js around lines 301/317) and HTTP GET activity adjacent to child_process usage in scripts/upgrade.cjs. Without traced execution-path corroboration it is not possible to determine whether these patterns reflect a legitimate self-update / build helper or an install-time dropper. The combination of an upgrade script that performs HTTP fetches and shell execution in the main module warrants human review before the package is trusted in a build pipeline.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
